Arb Mechanics

🟢 CREATE — ARKB trading at premium
Buy BTC on spot
→ Deliver to Coinbase Custody
→ Receive 5,000 ARKB shares from ARK/21Shares
→ Sell ARKB on exchange → capture premium

🔴 REDEEM — ARKB trading at discount
Buy ARKB on exchange (below NAV)
→ Redeem with ARK / 21Shares
→ Receive BTC from Coinbase Custody
→ Sell BTC on spot → capture discount

Cost Model

Create/Redeem Fee—
ETF Commission—
BTC Execution—
Market Impact (×2)—
BTC Spot Spread—
Mgmt Fee (21 bps/yr)continuous accrual
ARKB — ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF | Sponsor: ARK Investment Management / 21Shares | Custodian: Coinbase Custody
